experiments.reasoning: The passage describes a deliberate observation of a phenomenon (the luminous property of veal) involving a systematic procedure (including the preparation of the meat, its inclusion in a phial, and subsequent observation over multiple days). The description includes apparatus (the phial), a procedure (observing the meat after it was cut), and repeated observations over time.
experiments.description: The experiment involved observing and documenting the luminous properties of a piece of veal that had been cut from a previously observed piece. The meat was placed in a clean phial and observed over several days to track its luminosity in the dark.
experiments.quote: with this shining faculty, it was found, that a Legg of Veal, which was caused to be brought into my Chamber, had some shining places in it; though they were but very few and faint in comparison of those, that were conspicuous in the above-mentioned Neck. ... 'twas cut off from, to be luminous; and I found it to shine in the dark as vigorously as ever.
experiments.outcome: The piece of veal continued to shine vividly in the dark over several days, demonstrating persistent luminosity.
experiments.location: The experiment took place in the author's chamber (likely a private room in their residence)
